chunks.text: The official TNEA Counselling Code for Mohamed Sathak A.J. College of Engineering (MSAJCE) is 1301. Students applying through the Tamil Nadu Engineering Admissions (TNEA) portal must use this code to select the institution.
For direct admissions and enquiries, visit the official portal: https://enrollonline.co.in/Registration/Apply/MSAJCE. For fee payments, use: https://www.feepayr.com/.
